name: Llama 3.2
tagline: Added lightweight edge/mobile text models (1B, 3B) plus Meta's first Llama vision models (11B and 90B multimodal image-reasoning variants).
metaDescription: Llama 3.2 (Meta), released 2024-09-25 — part of the Llama 3 line. Added lightweight edge/mobile text models (1B, 3B) plus Meta's first Llama vision models (11B…
overview: Llama 3.2 is a large language model from Meta, part of the Llama 3 line. Released 2024-09-25. The previous-generation open-weight dense (text and vision) Llama line, spanning the 3.0 through 3.3 point releases.
What's notable in this version: Added lightweight edge/mobile text models (1B, 3B) plus Meta's first Llama vision models (11B and 90B multimodal image-reasoning variants).
